title: carex ramentaceofructus
intro: Carex ramentaceofructus, also known as the variegated sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and anti-viral activities. In herbal preparations, Carex ramentaceofructus is typically used in combination with other herbs, and can be found in traditional Chinese medicine formulas as a dried herb, tea, or in capsule form.
